name: Sharad Mishra
title: Backend / GenAI Software Engineer
summary: Backend engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable, event-driven systems on AWS and GCP. Focused on integrating Generative AI capabilities such as LLM-based automation and RAG into production-grade systems.
taglines: Designing resilient systems for modern AI products.
Turning infrastructure, APIs, and LLM workflows into polished user outcomes.
Blending backend rigor with immersive product storytelling.

highlights: Optimized IP infrastructure for email deliverability on GCP.
Designed an IP rotation system that improved inbox placement by 30%.
Built scalable APIs that maintained 99.9% uptime.
Developed monitoring systems that cut issue resolution time by 40%.
Built scalable REST APIs and improved performance by 40%.
Developed serverless microservices using AWS Lambda.
Implemented event-driven systems and RBAC to support secure scale.
Built a serverless loan processing API that reduced onboarding time by 50%.

projects.name: AI Finance Copilot
projects.summary: An AI-powered financial copilot using Groww MCP and GPT-5.4 to analyze holdings, balances, IPOs, market movers, and FnO data via natural-language interactions.
achievements: Mapped user intent to Groww MCP capabilities including portfolio retrieval, fundamentals screening, open-interest analysis, and margin estimation.
Returned explainable, structured responses designed for trust and usability.
Generated portfolio health summaries, concentration risk detection, stock comparison memos, and market opportunity watchlists.

education: B.Tech, Computer Science - UIET, CSJM University (2016 - 2020)
